case_title: CORREDOR CARLOS VS ORTIZ NANCY C DBA BUENAVENTURA TRAVEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $124.00 FILED BY CORREDOR CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ NANCY C DBA BUENAVENTURA TRAVEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
